## Meeting Purpose

[Galileo and GrowthX weekly sync to discuss content strategy, keyword research, and upcoming deliverables for SEO-driven content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to deliver 3 calibration articles, followed by 10 regular articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Mind-mapping session planned with Pertik (Galileo) and GrowthX team for technical content alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Balancing high-intent, LLM-specific keywords with foundational/glossary content for domain authority growth](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Exploring user-friendly ways to integrate high-volume educational content without overwhelming the blog](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [Three high-level strategies: landing & expand, clinical conveyor research, and paid ad site support](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Keyword research in progress, including competitor analysis (e.g., Arise)](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Debate on balancing high-intent, LLM-specific keywords vs. foundational/glossary content](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Consideration of "blue ocean" low/zero volume keywords for potential high-value traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Technical Content Collaboration

  - [Plan to involve Galileo's subject matter experts, especially for technical topics (e.g., evals, RAG, agents)](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Upcoming mind-mapping session with Pertik (Galileo) and GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Marcel working on initial research to inform the mind-mapping process](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

### Content Presentation and User Experience

  - [Discussion on how to showcase educational/glossary content without overwhelming the blog](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Potential use of tags or filters to organize content](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Priority on maintaining good user experience while increasing domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Traffic Quality Measurement

  - [Jimmy introduced tools (RB2B, GetQualler) for tracking visitor quality and lead scoring](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Ability to identify 20-30% of visitors and map content performance to ICP traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

### Content Ideas and Extensions

  - [Explore creating in-depth content on benchmarks, with potential for programmatic expansion](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Possibility of summarizing top weekly research papers flagged by Galileo's team](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Marcel shared example of custom GPT for prompting techniques, suggesting similar approach for evaluations/benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver 3 calibration articles for Galileo's review](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Schedule mind-mapping session with Pertik, Conor, and GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Galileo to provide feedback on calibration articles (tone, call-to-actions, snippets, case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Coordinate with Galileo's subject matter experts for highly technical content review](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [GrowthX to proceed with 10 articles per week after calibration](https://fathom.video/share/Bj6CrByvwH5dbGnJfybAc4AvctbGyK4g?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
